title: FUNCTION — Reduction Gear System

figures_detected.description: Cross-section diagram of the reduction gear system showing reduction gear, final drive gear, and speedometer drive gear locations on the differential case

content_blocks.text: The reduction gear system consists of a reduction gear and a final drive gear. Gears are helical, and a speedometer drive is located on the differential case. The differential is of similar construction to the manual transaxle.

content_blocks.description: Cross-section view of reduction gear system components

model_notes: Automatic transaxle (AT) section. Differential described as similar construction to manual transaxle.
